sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85794" key="pornokope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορνο-κοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n85794.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a whoremonger,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:188" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.188</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
